title: Beautiful Text — Typography
description: Great typography elevates any design. Set a serif font family for headings to create visual contrast with the sans-serif body text. Add font-weight and letter-spacing to fine-tune the headings. Create a .post-meta class for dates and author info using font-size, color, and text-transform: uppercase. Finally, style blockquote elements with italic text, a left border accent, and padding.
test_code:
assert 'font-weight' in css.lower(), 'Missing font-weight on headings'
assert 'letter-spacing' in css.lower(), 'Missing letter-spacing on headings'
assert 'text-transform' in css.lower(), 'Missing text-transform on .post-meta'
assert 'blockquote' in css.lower(), 'Missing blockquote selector'
assert 'font-style' in css.lower(), 'Missing font-style: italic on blockquote'
assert 'border-left' in css.lower(), 'Missing border-left on blockquote'
assert '.post-meta' in css.lower(), 'Missing .post-meta selector'
acceptance_criteria: Headings use a serif font-family with font-weight and letter-spacing
.post-meta is styled with small font-size, muted color, and text-transform: uppercase
blockquote has font-style: italic, a left border accent, and padding-left
hints: A serif stack for headings: font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif;
letter-spacing: 0.5px adds subtle breathing room to headings
text-transform: uppercase is great for metadata labels like dates and categories
